response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically mismatches the Reference JSON (JSON contains lyrics for a different verse/song section). I am ignoring the Reference JSON and relying strictly on the audio and on-screen stylized text for transcription. Vocals are primarily English with specific Japanese phrases ('僕らはexplosive', '明日もきっとbrighter'). Subtitles are tightly wrapped to the vocal bursts and end at 01:12 when the performance concludes and the instrumental credits begin.
